title: Chinese Placement
description: Jointly established by New York University and East China Normal University, NYU Shanghai is the third degree-granting campus in NYU’s global network, joining NYU Abu Dhabi and NYU's campus in New York City.
text:
Chinese Placement
Information about Chinese placement exam times, locations, and preparation tips can be found here. For questions about placement, email shanghai.worldlanguages@nyu.edu​.
All students are required to be proficient in Mandarin Chinese up to the Intermediate 2 level by graduation. Learn more about the Chinese Language Program at NYU Shanghai on the World Languages Website, or email shanghai.worldlanguages@nyu.edu.
Chinese courses offered at NYU Shanghai:
Post-advanced level Chinese courses are also available. Course descriptions of all Chinese courses at NYU Shanghai are in Albert Course Search (under CHIN-SHU).
Information for Advisors [Log-in Required]
